description_long: This is an adult male pedestrian with a modern, urban style. He wears a short-sleeved, striped shirt with a deep V-neck and matching striped arm warmers, paired with cargo-style pants that have visible pockets and zippers. His face is partially covered by a dark mask, and he has spiky, short hair styled upward. The figure is accessorized with wristbands and fingerless gloves, adding to the edgy, street-inspired look. He stands in a relaxed, upright posture, with his arms slightly away from his body. The overall appearance suggests a youthful, fashion-forward individual commonly seen in city environments.
description: A fashion-forward adult male in a striped shirt, cargo pants, and mask, with spiky hair and urban accessories. He stands upright, exuding a modern, street-inspired vibe.
description_view_0: Front view shows the striped shirt, mask, spiky hair, and wrist accessories clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the mask, arm warmers, and the layered look of the pants.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the striped shirt, hair, and the cargo pockets on the pants.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the side profile, arm accessories, and shoe details.
attribute_clothing_type: casual striped short-sleeve shirt, cargo pants, arm warmers, fingerless gloves, and a face mask
